name: workers-tsx-toolchain-spike
description: Experimental workerd-only TSX/Dynamic Worker compiler spike for Oxc/Rolldown/Vite-family tooling.

scripts.test: vitest run --config vitest.config.ts && vitest run --config vitest.workers.config.ts
scripts.test:startup: vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/node/wrangler-bundle-shape.test.ts && vitest run --config vitest.workers.config.ts tests/workers/measurements/oxc-operational-measurements.test.ts
scripts.test:risk: vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/node/toolchain-footprint.test.ts tests/node/wrangler-bundle-shape.test.ts && vitest run --config vitest.workers.config.ts tests/workers/measurements/toolchain-memory-risk.test.ts
